steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT ACCOUNT_NUMBER, ACCOUNT_NAME, SUM(ACCOUNT_VALUE) AS VALUE
FROM DFP_ITR_CVM
WHERE CNPJ='08.364.948/0001-38'
AND REPORT_DATE = (SELECT MAX(REPORT_DATE) FROM DFP_ITR_CVM WHERE CNPJ='08.364.948/0001-38' AND REPORT_DATE <= '2024-12-31')
GROUP BY ACCOUNT_NUMBER, ACCOUNT_NAME
ORDER BY ACCOUNT_NUMBER;"} }
steps.name: cvm_base_query_tool
